market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is cautiously bullish on AI stocks despite VIX rising 3.8% over five days, with traders citing stable pre-market futures. No major macro events today but options flow shows heavy call buying in NVDA. Yields at 4.57% cap broader upside.

predictions.reasoning: Flat futures and positive X chatter on tech earnings support a modest SPY gain; 5-day trend is +0.1% with VIX not yet signaling panic.
Heavy call flow noted but rising 10Y yield at 4.57% pressures high-valuation names; X shows profit-taking chatter after recent run.
EV sector sentiment improving on X with no negative headlines; aligns with broader risk-on tone in pre-market.
Crypto follows equity risk sentiment; 5-day -0.8% trend and higher yields weigh on BTC per recent X flows.
